doc: Pure-TS port of MPFR's mpfr_get_ui: round an MPFR value to the nearest unsigned 64-bit integer per rnd. Throws on NaN / ±Inf / overflow / negative-not-rounding-to-0, matching the C reference's ERANGE flag semantics but surfaced as a throw (no flag surface in the locked schema). The 'negative value that rounds to 0' edge case (e.g. -0.4 under RNDN) returns 0n successfully — mirrors mpfr_fits_ulong_p (mpfr/src/fits_u.h L39–L43).
c_signature: unsigned long mpfr_get_ui(mpfr_srcptr op, mpfr_rnd_t rnd)
divergence_from_c: Same as get_si: throws MPFRError('EPREC') rather than saturating with a flag. Return type is `bigint` (ULONG_MAX = 2^64 - 1 exceeds Number.MAX_SAFE_INTEGER). Negative-value-rounds-to-0 returns 0n (consistent with C's fits_ulong_p contract). NaN / Inf / negative-not-rounding-to-0 / >ULONG_MAX cases are EXCLUDED from the golden because they would throw and the harness can't grade expected-throw cases.
refs: src/ops/get_si.ts — signed sibling; same algorithm structure.
CLAUDE.md 'Hallucination-risk callouts' — NaN ≠ NaN; rounding-mode count is FIVE.
